name: Brian Zuzenak, HillaryClinton.com
subject: Knock on doors in your neighborhood!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
| Derek --

Every day our team is growing stronger than ever before, thanks to people across America who are volunteering their time to be part of this campaign, elect Hillary, and build a brighter future for our country.

You might still be wondering how you can help. Today, I want to talk about the single most important way you can help make sure people vote this November: face-to-face conversations, or canvassing. **[Interested in trying it out? Add your name now and we’ll be in touch to help you get started.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=21&ms=MjY0ODY5NzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgxOTI5OTU1S0&mt=1&rt=0)**

“Canvassing” just means knocking on doors and talking to voters, and research shows it’s the most effective way to make sure someone votes. Whether you’re canvassing your own neighborhood or traveling to another area that needs your help, the people you talk to are usually grateful and impressed that you took the time to talk with them about why this election matters to you -- and to give them useful information like where to vote.

**Why is canvassing important?** Any campaign has two key goals: persuasion (convincing people to vote for your candidate) and mobilization (getting people to show up and actually vote!). Canvassing is the most effective way to achieve BOTH of those goals.

When you participate in a mobilization canvass, you’ll talk to folks who already support Hillary to ask them to commit to vote and help them make a plan to make their voice heard in this election. In a persuasion canvass, you’ll talk to undecided voters -- and the best way to reach people is through one-on-one conversations. By sharing the reasons you’re voting for Hillary and how she’ll continue to promote a stronger, more secure America, you may just change someone’s mind -- or take them off the fence.

**Now the important part: How?** It can be intimidating to walk up to a stranger’s house and start a conversation, even in this election when there’s so much to talk about. But don’t worry! Your local campaign office will supply you with a canvassing packet containing a script, a list of targeted households with the names of voters we want to reach, and corresponding maps to help you on your way. The whole experience is highly structured -- so you’ll never be left wondering what to say or who to say it to.

Canvassing is truly one of the most rewarding ways to get involved in this election. You’ll meet new people, see new neighborhoods and gain a deeper appreciation for the issues facing voters in this important election. In short, you are our best weapon against Trump. Are you in?

**Add your name to say you’re interested in canvassing, and we’ll be in touch to help you get started:**
[](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=MjY0ODY5NzMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgxOTI5OTU1S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks -- let’s win this together!

Brian

Brian Zuzenak
Virginia State Director
Hillary for America

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: A quick thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
The warmest, toughest, most dependable team | Hi, Derek!

I just wanted to thank you and everyone on this team for all the well-wishes you’ve sent.

And since I've been hearing from so many people today, I wanted to tell you personally that I'm feeling fine and getting better. (It doesn't hurt to be able to spend some time at home with my dogs.)

Like anyone who’s ever been home sick from work, I’m just anxious to get back out there. There's so much at stake in this election, and we only have 57 days left in this campaign -- I want to make each one count.

Thank you for being the warmest, toughest, and most dependable team I could hope for -- you've lifted me up, today and every day.

\- H

name: Paul Ryan
subject: Wake-Up Call
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized
body: Peter, The first votes of the 2016 election are being cast next week. That should be a wake-up call to every single conservative out there. While the media will continue their countdown to November 8th, we don't have nearly that much time remaining. The reality is that 3 in 10 votes will be cast prior to Election Day - meaning this election could be decided well before November 8th. If we're going to win, we need to act right now. http://email.granitelists.com/ct/37529132:sFTP1GbNw:m:3:1155937413:B4366C073CE4C6BB1319CF8A9865487F:r That's why I've ordered the creation of the Conservative Mobilization Fund. http://email.granitelists.com/ct/37529133:sFTP1GbNw:m:3:1155937413:B4366C073CE4C6BB1319CF8A9865487F:r This fund's sole mission: to mobilize and turn out conservatives from across the country. Friend- The politicians and liberal elites have not been listening to you. But I hear you loud and clear. That’s why I am the people’s candidate for president with a rising movement of pro-America voters ready to take back our country. As one of my best and most loyal supporters, you can do a lot to help finish this race strong and send Crooked Hillary down to defeat. Please take a minute right now to complete our Listening to America Survey so I can hear your voice at this important moment in the race. You have my word I will take action on YOUR concerns and speak up for YOUR interests. That’s what I’ve been doing this whole time. When I said we should not be letting tens of thousands of Syrian refugees into our country if we don't know who they are, the liberal elites screamed out against me, but they were not listening to you. When I said we should build a real border wall because if you don’t have a border, you don’t have a country, they raged against me on TV, but they were not listening to you. When I said China is ripping us off with all these stupid trade deals, the liberal elites screamed about their globalist economic theories, but they were not listening to you. Well I have been listening to you, Friend. I have been taking you seriously. And I will not let you down. So our campaign – our pro-America movement – is taking a new approach that hasn’t been tried before by the D.C. insiders. I am campaigning on a message that seeks to represent the American people only, NOT lobbyists, NOT the media, and NOT corporate elites. The reason I have surged in the polls from 'day one' of this race is because I have been listening to you – the great silent majority of Americans - and keeping you and other supporters engaged every step along the way. With just two months to go before Election Day, I need you to stay engaged more than ever, so please complete our Listening to America Survey. In addition to your valuable answers, I also hope I can count on you to make a special donation in support of our campaign at this critical time. Crooked Hillary has tons of money from the liberal elites who have rigged everything against you. The media are in her corner too, and frankly I don’t think I’ve seen the media in this country behave in such a disgusting way as they have against me. So many lies! Friend ,

What an incredible week we had last week.

Now we're all working hard to keep building our momentum, as we enter the final stretch of this historic campaign.

[**Will you JOIN US at this critical time?**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eccbaLH7QBPMkBC6OoaCYWeDRMN6aaaaLDAxBL2QFKya?s=3@7264y&g=brukjngu49_eoYkj.emo&j=n&v=&t=y~z5z88cbAkqkglvso8vni8lde8v8v8jdAc%254~A%250Dac&rAr)

You may have seen the news that we've made our biggest ad buy so far - **a $10 million strategic purchase to hit the airwaves in nine key swing states with a powerful message on the economy.**

This ad highlights how a Hillary Clinton presidency would mean more of the same disastrous Obama economic policies AND WORSE... while a Trump presidency will mean __better trade deals__ for our country, __tax cuts__ for middle-class families and __MILLIONS of new jobs.__

[**Friend , p**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eccbaLH7QBPMkBC6OoaCYWeDRMN6aaaaLDAxBL2QFKya?s=3@7264y&g=brukjngu49_eoYkj.emo&j=i&v=&t=y~z5z88cbAkqkglvso8vni8lde8v8v8jdAc%254~A%250Dac&rAr)**[lease make a generous contribution of $15, $35, $55, $75, $100 or even $200 right now and help lead Donald Trump to victory.](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eccbaLH7QBPMkBC6OoaCYWeDRMN6aaaaLDAxBL2QFKya?s=3@7264y&g=brukjngu49_eoYkj.emo&j=m&v=&t=y~z5z88cbAkqkglvso8vni8lde8v8v8jdAc%254~A%250Dac&rAr)**
More and more people are tuning in to this race now, and we're seeing the Trump movement continue to build tremendous momentum all across country.
Undecided voters know deep down that Mr. Trump is the ONLY candidate in this race who will fight to _put our people first and Make America Great Again._
**That 's why recent polls of voters in Ohio, Michigan, and Pennsylvania show that swing and traditional Democrat states are gravitating toward Mr. Trump's message... and several national polls show Mr. Trump retaking the lead.**
The race is clearly tightening, Friend ... but of course nobody is hearing much about these polls from the liberal media.
That's why it's so important that we continue to reach voters _directly_ with our winning message, which is a big part of my job - and that's why getting you on board right now is _so critical._
[**_Please officially JOIN Team Trump today with a special contribution of $100, $75, $50, $35, $20 or $10, to help us purchase additional TV ad time in key swing states. Every bit of support is a HUGE help._**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eccbaLH7QBPMkBC6OoaCYWeDRMN6aaaaLDAxBL2QFKya?s=3@7264y&g=brukjngu49_eoYkj.emo&j=g&v=&t=y~z5z88cbAkqkglvso8vni8lde8v8v8jdAc%254~A%250Dac&rAr)
**[JOIN NOW WITH A CONTRIBUTION](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eccbaLH7QBPMkBC6OoaCYWeDRMN6aaaaLDAxBL2QFKya?s=3@7264y&g=brukjngu49_eoYkj.emo&j=l&v=&t=y~z5z88cbAkqkglvso8vni8lde8v8v8jdAc%254~A%250Dac&rAr)**
While we've made our biggest ad buy to date last week, there's no question that we must _immediately_ step up our fundraising, organizing and persuasion efforts.
**There are only 56 days now until Election Day, and absentee voting starts in numerous states beginning in JUST WEEKS.**
**[Please JOIN our efforts with your most generous possible contribution today.](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eccbaLH7QBPMkBC6OoaCYWeDRMN6aaaaLDAxBL2QFKya?s=3@7264y&g=brukjngu49_eoYkj.emo&j=k&v=&t=y~z5z88cbAkqkglvso8vni8lde8v8v8jdAc%254~A%250Dac&rAr)**

**More and more people are tuning in to this race now, and we 're seeing the Trump movement continue to build tremendous momentum all across country.** Undecided voters know deep down that Mr. Trump is the ONLY candidate in this race who will fight to put our people first and Make America Great Again.

[**Please JOIN our efforts with your most generous possible contribution today.**](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/eccbaLH7QBPMkBC6OoaCYWeDRMN6aaaaLDAxBL2QFKya?s=3@7264y&g=brukjngu49_eoYkj.emo&j=k&v=&t=y~z5z88cbAkqkglvso8vni8lde8v8v8jdAc%254~A%250Dac&rAr)
The Clinton campaign has already spent $70 million on TV ads, and has set aside another $80 million to attack Mr. Trump and our movement on the airwaves this fall.

body:
Reuters forecast model | Derek --

I saw something interesting in our news clips last week, and I wanted to make sure to flag it for you.

Reuters has a forecast model that takes polling and combines it with an analysis of voting patterns -- and under that projection, Donald Trump has nearly tripled his chances of becoming president since August. What’s changed? Simple: States like Florida and Ohio that had been considered likely wins for us before, are now back on the table -- which means we have work to do.

**[It’s absolutely critical that we up our investment in those states in the next eight weeks -- that’s why we’re pushing so hard to bring in 2.5 million donors to this campaign, starting with you. Can you help? We’ll even send you a free sticker as a thank you!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=MjY0ODc2MTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgxOTQ0ODQwS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

One of the reasons Trump is gaining ground is that his supporters are stepping up. He and the GOP raised $90 million in August -- Trump’s best month ever -- and a lot of that money is coming from his small donors.

Derek, I know how much stronger our team is than his -- I really do. But the truth is that we’ve got to step up and show it. If we allow ourselves to be lulled into complacency with just eight weeks to go, we could find out just how easy it is to let this race slip through our fingers.

**I have no intention of letting that happen, and I know you don’t, either. So let’s not wake up on November 9th knowing we could have done just a little bit more -- let’s leave it all out on the field and fight with everything we have for the country we love and the candidate we believe in. She’s counting on us more than ever:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjY0ODc2MTES1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgxOTQ0ODQwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks,

Robby

Campaign Manager
Hillary for America

| Peter --

For too long, working families have been let down by politicians who break their promises on jobs. That's why the Ohio Teamsters are endorsing Rob Portman. The Ohio Teamsters looked at both candidates in Ohio's race for the United States Senate, and we endorsed and threw our support behind Rob Portman because he is the best choice for our more than 50,000 hardworking Teamsters and their families across Ohio.

The Portman campaign just released a new ad highlighting the support of the Ohio Teamsters, and I hope you will [click here](https://www.robportman.com/protecting_jobs?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sonny_blast&n=1) or on the video below to watch why Teamsters from across our great state are backing Rob Portman’s campaign.

[](https://www.robportman.com/protecting_jobs?e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=sonny_blast&n=2)
Senator Portman's word is his bond, and there's no stronger champion for American workers and American manufacturers. Rob is standing up to China to protect Ohio jobs.

I’m a Democrat and a strong union guy. Take it from me: Ohio workers can trust Rob Portman to have their backs and fight for good jobs and higher wages in the U.S. Senate.

Sincerely,

Sonny Nardi
Secretary-Treasurer of Teamsters Ohio D.R.I.V.E. [

body:
His poll numbers are going up | Derek --

Last week, we learned that Trump’s fundraising is surging -- he and the GOP raked in $90 million in August.

We also saw a perfect example of the way that the media have failed to hold him accountable -- when Matt Lauer let Trump lie about his opposition to the war in Iraq in a broadcast watched by 15 million people.

And we've seen that Trump's poll numbers are on the rise -- CNN showed Trump ahead nationally for the first time in months, and in crucial states like Nevada (where NBC has Trump with a one-point lead) and Florida (where CBS has our lead down to two points).

There's no denying that he's enjoyed a good string of headlines recently, but this week, we can help to deliver some bad news for Trump.

On Thursday, we have our mid-month fundraising deadline. **[We’ve set an aggressive goal of 2.5 million donors by the end of the month to get our campaign where it needs to be -- can you chip in for the first time and join our team today? We’ll send you a free sticker as a thank you.](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjY0OTE5NzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgyMDQxNzcyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

If we hit that benchmark, it will send a message that we haven't been knocked off our game. But even more than that, this fundraising total will determine how much we can spend on ad buys and dictate how many people we can dispatch to key battleground states where Trump is making noise (like Nevada and Florida, for instance).

**From right now until the end of the month, we need to bring in a total of 2.5 million donors to this campaign -- and to hit that goal, we need 14 new donors from your area today. Will you be one of them?** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjY0OTE5NzIS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgyMDQxNzcyS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you,

Robby

body:
Donald Trump is listening to the voices of millions of Americans who want a new direction in Washington. Add your voice and guide his campaign to victory over the Obama-Clinton liberals. |

Friend- The politicians and liberal elites have not been listening to you. But I hear you loud and clear. That’s why I am the people’s candidate for president with a rising movement of pro-America voters ready to take back our country. As one of my best and most loyal supporters, you can do a lot to help finish this race strong and send Crooked Hillary down to defeat. Please take a minute right now to complete our Listening to America Survey so I can hear your voice at this important moment in the race. You have my word I will take action on YOUR concerns and speak up for YOUR interests. That’s what I’ve been doing this whole time. When I said we should not be letting tens of thousands of Syrian refugees into our country if we don't know who they are, the liberal elites screamed out against me, but they were not listening to you. When I said we should build a real border wall because if you don’t have a border, you don’t have a country, they raged against me on TV, but they were not listening to you. When I said China is ripping us off with all these stupid trade deals, the liberal elites screamed about their globalist economic theories, but they were not listening to you. Well I have been listening to you, Friend. I have been taking you seriously. And I will not let you down. So our campaign – our pro-America movement – is taking a new approach that hasn’t been tried before by the D.C. insiders. I am campaigning on a message that seeks to represent the American people only, NOT lobbyists, NOT the media, and NOT corporate elites. The reason I have surged in the polls from 'day one' of this race is because I have been listening to you – the great silent majority of Americans - and keeping you and other supporters engaged every step along the way. With just two months to go before Election Day, I need you to stay engaged more than ever, so please complete our Listening to America Survey. In addition to your valuable answers, I also hope I can count on you to make a special donation in support of our campaign at this critical time. Crooked Hillary has tons of money from the liberal elites who have rigged everything against you. The media are in her corner too, and frankly I don’t think I’ve seen the media in this country behave in such a disgusting way as they have against me. So many lies! So help me cut through the media nonsense and take our message right to the people. Complete our Listening to America Survey Thank you, Donald Trump

Friend,

Last month, Team Bayh put out a call for volunteers, who will work side by side with our campaign staff to build the strongest grassroots effort we can and take Indiana's Senate seat back from special interests.

But I realize that not everyone is able to volunteer. So I'm asking you -- if you can't volunteer yourself, **[will you consider donating $5 to our Volunteer Support Fund?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50497/7be36b49/1efa2aa6/78f89869/1062240902/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-volunteersupportfund?refcode=20160913nd&amount=10") Our goal is 500 donors.**

Your donation to this special fund will help our campaign provide our volunteers things like pizza during those long phone-banking sessions, yard signs and bumper stickers to hand out (and help catch voters' attention), and technology to make door-to-door canvassing more efficient.

These may seem like small things, but they really make a difference to our campaign -- and the incredible volunteers who power it.

**[Will you pitch in $5 today to support our Volunteer Support Fund?](https://bayh.bsd.net/page/m/32a50497/7be36b49/1efa2aa6/78f89869/1062240902/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/eb-volunteersupportfund?refcode=20160913nd&amount=10")**

Our elected officials forget that our government was created to work for us, not the special interests. I’ve always said it from the beginning Friend, that our campaign is for the people. Our campaign is about making America great again for the middle class, not the special interest class. That’s why I’m fighting to give a voice to the people and stand up to these phony politicians like Crooked Hillary. And I’d be honored if you stood with me by signing the “Uphold the U.S. Constitution” petition here. By signing your name to this “Uphold the U.S. Constitution” petition, it’ll show my campaign that you too believe that our elected officials need to protect our founding document. name: Greg Gianforte
subject: It's About Emili
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greg for Montana, PO
body:
Greg for Montana

Greg for Montana

Friend,

Standing up for Montana jobs is
THE job of the Governor. But career politician Steve Bullock has
let us down. He's let mothers like Emili and families like the
Vincents down, by not fighting for Colstrip.

Today, Colstrip Units 1 and 2 are
planning to close. Which is why Emili's words are more moving
than ever - "it's scary to have a house in a ghost town."

No Montana community should be a
ghost town with today's opportunities for innovation and growth.

Don't you agree?

But Steve Bullock took campaign
contributions from members of the groups - MEIC and Sierra Club
- that sued to shut Colstrip down and take away those jobs. He
failed to join the lawsuit against Obama's Clean Power Plan, and
refused to fight. And for what? A few thousand dollars in
campaign contributions?

Well to me, the fight to save
Colstrip isn't about politics. It's about Emili.

That's why I'll fight for the
Vincent family and work every day for the folks in Colstrip.
I'll fight for the 7,000 jobs at stake, the $1.5 billion impact
closing Colstrip would have on Montana's economy, and to make
sure electricity prices don't skyrocket statewide.

Join us in to fight for Montana
jobs in Colstrip and across the state. Pitch in $10, $25 or even
$50 today.

Thank you,
Greg

Box 1557, Helena, MT, 59624, Republican

subject: We need 14 people to stand up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
Hillary understands what it takes | Derek --

Over the past eight years, I have met so many young people who are achieving their dreams even though the odds are stacked against them: students who take the long way to school to avoid the gangs, kids whose families keep budgets for years to send them to college, young people at the top of their college class who were the first in their family to continue their education past high school.

Every one of these young people reminds me that we're not just governing for today -- we’re working for tomorrow.

Hillary understands this. She advocated for children with disabilities as a young lawyer, helped get health care for millions of kids as First Lady, fought for affordable child care in the Senate, and as president, I know she'll make the next generation her highest priority.

In order for that to happen, Derek, we need to stand up for her -- all of us together. Her campaign has set an ambitious 2.5 million donor goal, and they need 14 people from your area to contribute today in order to reach it before the end of the month. [**Will you join this team at this critical moment and chip in for the first time? They’ll send you a free sticker as a thank you.**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjY0OTcyOTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgyMDgwMzc3S0&mt=1&rt=0)

| Dear Friend -- I've spent a lot of time working on campaigns. In that time, I've seen the ups and downs, the twists and turns, that are part and parcel of any election cycle. I've never seen an election year like this one, however. It's highly unpredictable -- and that alarms me. **I 'm particularly uneasy that, here in Washington, too many people are taking the governor's race for granted.** We shouldn't be. Republican Bill Bryant's friends have deep, deep pockets. We've already seen how he can tap into large amounts of cash at the last moment. With big money from his very rich friends, Bryant can launch an October surprise blitz of attack ads. Jay's campaign could be caught off guard. We must not let that happen. It's critical that we're prepared for any advertising ambush from Bill Bryant and his right-wing allies. * **_Citizens United_ will stand, and dark money will continue to cloud our elections.** Ayotte said it's "absurd" to overturn _Citizens United_ and has been an outspoken opponent of campaign finance reform.

body:
We can't afford a leader who puts partisan politics ahead of the best interests of our state. Sign if you agree.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202456/2fde7c66/40917879/156a92c0/2266747460/VEsH/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/sign-your-name-if-you-agree-its-time-to-repeal-hb-2-now?utm_campaign=adv_ncaa_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em16_160913_adv_gq_ncaa_ful__rc")
---
Friends, Since Governor McCrory signed House Bill 2 into law six months ago, there has been a real impact on North Carolina's economy and reputation. Already, we have lost thousands of jobs and hundreds of millions of dollars in economic activity. And now, just last night, the NCAA pulled all of their championships -- including the NCAA basketball tournament -- out of our state. **[Enough is enough. Sign this petition if you agree that we can't afford a leader who puts partisan politics ahead of the best interests of our state.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202456/2fde7c66/40917879/156a92c0/2266747460/VEsE/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/sign-your-name-if-you-agree-its-time-to-repeal-hb-2-now?utm_campaign=adv_ncaa_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em16_160913_adv_gq_ncaa_ful__rc")** Every time we get more bad news -- instead of doing what's right for our state -- Governor McCrory doubles down on what he knows he did wrong. **For the sake of our schools, our children, our economy, and our good name, it's time to set the politics aside and undo this discriminatory law.** **[Add your name here if you agree.](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202456/2fde7c66/40917879/156a92c0/2266747460/VEsF/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/sign-your-name-if-you-agree-its-time-to-repeal-hb-2-now?utm_campaign=adv_ncaa_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em16_160913_adv_gq_ncaa_ful__rc")** Thanks for all you continue to do for North Carolina, Roy | | [**Sign the petition ->**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1202456/2fde7c66/40917879/156a92c0/2266747460/VEsC/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/sign-your-name-if-you-agree-its-time-to-repeal-hb-2-now?utm_campaign=adv_ncaa_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cooper&source=em16_160913_adv_gq_ncaa_ful__rc")
